footer.description: A multidisciplinary journal of uncompromising editorial rigor, publishing original research across the natural sciences, engineering, social sciences, and humanities. Academic luxury meets scholarly authority.
footer.issnLine: ISSN 2945-1138 · Publisher prefix 10.52011 · Editorial office: London, United Kingdom

home.description: Eleventh Press International Publishing is a peer-reviewed, open-access multidisciplinary journal. Rigorous editorial workflow, {registrar} DOI registration, and OAI-PMH 2.0 indexing — engineered for high-performance scholarly discovery.
home.ctaHeadline: Submit your manuscript or subscribe to read
